name: mindcraft-agent

scripts.test: node --test packages/agent/electron/pluginState.test.js packages/agent/electron/skillsSecurity.test.js packages/agent/electron/skillsCatalogCache.test.js packages/agent/electron/userDataPath.test.js packages/agent/electron/codexRuntimeConfig.test.js packages/agent/electron/codexPanelStatePaths.test.js packages/agent/electron/codexFileChangePreview.test.js packages/agent/electron/sessionRegistry.test.js packages/agent/electron/sessionRegistry.codexIntegration.test.js packages/agent/electron/sessionRegistry.claudeIntegration.test.js packages/agent/electron/sessionRegistry.panelLifecycle.test.js packages/agent/electron/db/db.test.js tests/icon-assets.test.js tests/document-locator.test.cjs tests/codex-provider-toml.test.mjs tests/codex-model-slots.test.mjs tests/local-path-tokenizer.test.mjs tests/markdown-it-local-link.test.mjs tests/agent-markdown-render.test.mjs tests/codex-empty-draft-parity.test.cjs tests/agent-public-renderer-boundary.test.cjs tests/agent-runtime-boundary.test.cjs tests/agent-shared-entrypoints.test.cjs tests/agent-shared-imports.test.cjs tests/agent-vue-import-boundary.test.cjs tests/claude-meta-user-prompt.test.mjs tests/claude-background-task-tracker.test.cjs tests/claude-resume-recovery.test.cjs tests/claude-task-notification-stream.test.mjs tests/codex-visible-user-message.test.mjs tests/codex-event-rendering-contract.test.mjs tests/codex-stream-rendering-contract.test.mjs tests/codex-ui-event-mapper.test.mjs tests/codex-agent-done-reason.test.mjs tests/history-hydration-authority.test.mjs tests/diff-split-view-template.test.cjs tests/chat-scroll-state.test.mjs tests/scheduled-session-refresh.test.mjs tests/panel-composable-chain.test.mjs tests/metrics-dedup-helper.test.mjs tests/skill-plugin-cache-clear.test.cjs tests/workbench-navigation-intent.test.mjs && node --test tests/workbench-navigation-entries.test.mjs tests/document-save-boundary.test.cjs tests/md-routing.test.cjs tests/document-watch-manager.test.cjs tests/document-edit-state.test.mjs tests/document-tabs-persistence.test.mjs tests/agent-input-dock-shell.test.mjs tests/agent-file-link-intent-source.test.mjs tests/agent-workspace-context.test.mjs tests/workbench-workspace-registry.test.cjs tests/workbench-workspace-key-parity.test.mjs tests/app-close-coordinator.test.mjs
scripts.test:undef: eslint --no-warn-ignored packages/agent/electron/codexAgent.js packages/agent/electron/claudeAgent.js packages/agent/electron/shared/ packages/agent/electron/claude/ packages/agent/electron/codex/
scripts.test:contract: npm run test:undef && node tests/run-contract-tests.cjs contract
scripts.test:all: npm run test:undef && node tests/run-contract-tests.cjs all
scripts.electron:build-beta: cross-env NODE_ENV=testing NODE_PLATFORM=WIN node ./build/build.js --version ; vite build --mode test && electron-builder --config=./build/builder.test.json
scripts.electron:build-beta-ios: cross-env NODE_ENV=testing NODE_PLATFORM=IOS node ./build/build.js --version ; NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 vite build --mode testIos && electron-builder --config=./build/builder.test.ios.json --mac
scripts.electron:build-prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production NODE_PLATFORM=WIN node ./build/build.js --version ; vite build --mode prod && electron-builder --config=./build/builder.prod.json
scripts.electron:build-prod-ios: cross-env NODE_ENV=production NODE_PLATFORM=IOS node ./build/build.js --version ; NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 vite build --mode prodIos && electron-builder --config=./build/builder.prod.ios.json --mac

description: A desktop workspace for Claude Code and Codex.
author: Hanson Cui
